code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut current = 0
mut has_digit = false
mut sign = 1
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_digit = true
  else if b == 45 and not has_digit
    sign = 0 - 1
  else
    if has_digit
      nums = list.push(nums, current * sign)
      current = 0
      has_digit = false
      sign = 1
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_digit
  nums = list.push(nums, current * sign)
end

mut sum = 0
mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  let v_opt = nums.get(j)
  let v = match v_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  sum = sum + v
  if j == 0
    out = "#{sum}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{sum}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
